description_long: This is a black sneaker with a white sole, adorned with various colorful graffiti-style text and symbols, including musical notes, stars, and phrases like 'MORE', 'SO FAT', and 'I'M HANDSOME GORGEOUS'. The shoe features prominent metallic spikes along the sides and back, adding a bold, punk-inspired aesthetic. The laces are black and arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. The heel is decorated with a white spherical accent and a small flower-like emblem. The overall design is playful and expressive, combining street art motifs with unconventional embellishments. The shoe appears to be in pristine, unworn condition, with no visible signs of dirt or wear.
description: A black sneaker with graffiti-style decorations, metallic spikes, and a white sole, featuring playful text and musical motifs. The shoe is bold, expressive, and in new condition.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black laces, graffiti text 'MORE', and the rounded white toe cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large musical note, metallic spikes, and graffiti text along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the white spherical accent, flower emblem, and a row of metallic spikes on the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view features more graffiti text, a musical note, and additional spikes, with the white heel accent visible.
